working_on.notes: Implemented immediate process stop in frontend and separated export settings for AI generation vs file merging to improve file organization.

recent_changes.description: Added 'Stop' button to Generator screen with immediate cancellation logic for both single and batch modes.
Implemented separate persistent export path settings for Merged DOCX files.
Fixed 'Cancel' button behavior in batch mode dialog by switching to Tauri's async 'ask' API and ensuring the view resets on cancellation.
Fixed UI bug where the Stop button was only visible after first file was generated in batch mode.

decisions_made.reason: Immediate UI feedback is crucial; checking for a local 'isCancelled' flag after each async call in the loop is the most reliable way to halt the process without complex backend thread management.
Decoupling AI generation paths from Merged file paths allows users to organize their source and final combined files into different folders easily.
